structural.engineer: TBD (government procurement rules — contracting entity coordinates)
structural.notes: Structural drawings integrated: foundation plan on flat municipal land, reinforced concrete frame, public occupancy seismic design (Zone C per CFE). Coordinated with architectural plans at 1:100.

electrical.notes: Single-line diagram and panel schedules complete. Public safety lighting and emergency systems included. Energy efficiency compliance for public building occupancy. Computer lab power density calculations included.

lighting.notes: Interior and exterior public area lighting design complete. Reading room task lighting, children's zone color-tunable lighting, civic lobby accent lighting, exterior security and wayfinding lighting included. Energy efficiency (NOM-007-ENER) compliance confirmed.

water.notes: Plumbing and hydraulic layout for public restrooms (4 units, accessibility code counts per IMSS/ISSSTE), service areas, landscape irrigation connection points. Potable water and sanitary drainage systems coordinated.

irrigation.notes: Irrigation system design for landscape areas — drip and subsurface irrigation for drought-tolerance in Baja California Sur climate. Coordinated with grading and drainage plan.

solar.notes: Solar PV system design for public building — rooftop array sized for partial building load offset. Required by contracting entity and in scope per seed data. System design coordinated with electrical single-line diagram.
